import React from 'react'; import { CONTRACTORS } from '../data/mockData'; export default function Contractors() { return (
Contractors
Approved service partners
{CONTRACTORS.map(c => (
{c.name.slice(0,2).toUpperCase()}
{c.name}
{c.speciality}
★ {c.rating}
rating
Active Work Orders {c.activeWOs}
))}
); }
